title.en: A few extradimensional epochs, for them, are ju...

content.en:
The Wind Rift Realm God felt that it would not be a problem for him and the doppelganger of the Ziya Realm God to kill a peak realm god of a weak territory.

Of course.

They also obtained information from the Blood Realm God that Ye Tian had multiple clones, but this was nothing, they were sure to find out all of Ye Tian's clones and his body, kill them all, and kill them completely.

In fact, Ye Tian's strength, the Blood Degree Realm God also said in the transmission, it was not much stronger than him, but it was only by relying on a large number of super dimensional secret treasures and multiple clones to besiege it, so he killed the Blood Degree Realm God.

And the strength of the Blood Degree Realm God was far inferior to them, they could easily kill the Blood Degree Realm God, and naturally they could easily kill Ye Tian.

Even if Ye Tian's strength has increased a little in these extra-dimensional eras, in just a few extra-dimensional eras, there is no way to improve his strength at all.

A few extradimensional epochs, for them, are just time to take a nap.

They didn't believe that in just a few extradimensional eras, Ye Tian's strength would be able to surpass them?

There are almost no major opportunities in the territory of Seven Thousand Three Hundred and Sixty-two, no matter how demonic the peak realm god is, it is impossible to ~ quickly improve his strength.

Therefore, it is almost impossible for their retaliation technique to fail.

Now, they could only hope that Ye Tian had enough extra-dimensional resources on his body to be able to make up for their losses a little.

......

In the days that followed, the Ice Ghost Organization began to prepare for entering the territory of Seven Thousand Three Hundred and Sixty-two.

It takes time for the Domain-Breaking Star Array to locate the 7,362 Territory, the Boundary Disk to be integrated into the Domain-Breaking Star Array, and to invest a lot of resources.

A tenth of an extradimensional epoch time is sufficient.

Gradually, the years passed, and a tenth of an extradimensional era passed.

this day.

The Ice Ghost Organization is officially preparing to enter the territory of 7362, and everything is ready.

"Demarcation Disk, Activate!"

"Domain-Breaking Star Array Activated!"

"All the pinnacle realm gods are ready to start the extradimensional leap!"

Rumble!!!!!

The Domain-Breaking Boundary Star Array was activated, forcibly crossing the extradimensional void, tearing apart the boundary extradimensional barrier of Territory 7362, and descending on Territory 7362.

Seven thousand three hundred and sixty-two territories.

In one area, the extradimensional void was distorted, and one after another figures descended, and they were the doppelgangers of the Ziya Realm God and the Wind Crack Realm God.

"What a barren territory, the extradimensional storm has destroyed everything here!"

The God of the Ziya Realm looked at the surroundings of the void and said lightly.

"Still be careful, don't run around, otherwise we may not be able to escape if we encounter a half-step extradimensional creature in the extradimensional realm. "

The Wind Rift God said.

"Let the Golden Eagle Puppet find its way!"

The Ziya Realm God released a puppet, which is a puppet specially used to explore the Void of Death, and its strength is only equivalent to the combat power of an ordinary peak realm god, but its life-saving ability is terrifying, and its speed is very good, which is suitable for pathfinding.

And this kind of puppet is not very troublesome to make, and even if it is lost, it will not be too distressing.

......

"The Ice Ghost Organization has arrived!"

Ye Tian was a little surprised.

He thought that the Ice Ghost Organization would come after ten extradimensional eras, but now it has come.

Now that it has come, the price paid by the Ice Ghost Organization is too great, could it be that the Ice Ghost Organization hates him so much?

However, the sooner the Ice Ghost Organization came, the better, and that was exactly what he was looking forward to.

The Ice Ghost Organization did not hide its whereabouts, and the fluctuations of the advent were too great, Ye Tian relied on the strange blood pupils to spy on the traces of the peak realm gods of the Ice Ghost Organization.

Subsequently.

He locked on to the location of the Domain-Breaking Boundary Star Array.

He didn't stop the pinnacle realm gods of the Ice Ghost Organization in the first place, in case his strength was exposed and the Ice Ghost Organization was afraid, then it was very likely that the Ice Ghost Organization would directly close the Domain-Breaking Realm Star Array.

"First leave the Seven Thousand Three Hundred and Sixty-Two Territory through the Domain Breaking Star Array, and then kill these peak Realm Gods. "

Ye Tian had this plan in his heart.

......

Ye Tian quickly shuttled to the side of the Domain-Breaking Realm Star Array in a copy of the Death Void, he hid himself with extradimensional power, and the Ice Ghost Organization would never be able to discover him.

Moreover, his speed is very fast, and now that the Death Void does not have an extradimensional storm, he is super fast.

It didn't take long for him to arrive at the location of the Domain-Breaking Boundary Star Array.

At this time, there is also a peak realm god guarding here.

After all, the Ice Ghost Organization was also worried that the peak realm god of the Seven Thousand Three Hundred and Sixty-two Territory would destroy the formation portal of the Domain-Breaking Boundary Star Array, and if it was destroyed, then it would be necessary to activate the Domain-Breaking Boundary Star Array again, and the price paid would be doubled.

So, it must be guarded.

"Ten peak realm gods, each of them is comparable in strength to the Liangyi realm gods!"

Ye Tian's preliminary estimate.

It was very easy for him to kill such a peak realm god.

Whew![]

Ye Tian appeared in front of these peak realm gods, and these ten peak realm gods were stunned, but before they could react, they were attacked by Ye Tian.

"True Ming Light Domain!"

This extradimensional technique has become very terrifying with the blessing of the true extradimensional power.

Rumble!!!!

The True Ming Light Domain enveloped these ten peak realm gods, causing their bodies to be frozen and completely unable to move.

At this moment, they were extremely terrifying.

However, the next moment.

Ten True Inscription Auroras pierced through their bodies, killing them instantly.

After killing these ten peak realm gods, Ye Tianyi waved his hand, took their belongings, and then broke into the formation portal, passed through the portal, and came to another territory.

Seven thousand three hundred and twenty-two territory, the Sea of Ice Wind.

Division of the Ice Ghost Organization.

Ye Tian came here.

"Who are you?"

The pinnacle realm gods sensed the unfamiliar aura on Ye Tian's body, and they waited for them one by one.

Rumble!!!!

The power of the extradimensional exploded, and these peak realm gods were like ants, directly crushed by Ye Tian.

In the blink of an eye, all the pinnacle realm gods here were killed.

Immediately afterwards, Ye Tian made a strong move and killed all the realm gods in this division.

He didn't know if the information here had been leaked, and even if it did, the Ice Ghost Organization wouldn't be able to help him.

In fact.

The essence of the god of the Ziya Realm was the first to know what was going on.

However, the Great Leader of the Sub-Tooth Realm God and the Ice Ghost Organization immediately recalled the Bounding Disk.

The Ice Ghost Organization's Domain-Breaking Star Arrays are all connected, and they can forcibly take away the Boundary Disk through the formations.

Rumble!!!

The delimiting disk was forcibly removed, and the Domain-Breaking Star Array of this branch immediately shattered, and the passage connecting the 7,362nd Territory disappeared.

"The ice ghost organization reacted so quickly, and before I came in, they destroyed the formation!"

Ye Tian said with emotion.
